IPD.title: IPD
IPD.description: Search Hong Kong trade marks, patents, and designs via the Intellectual Property Department registry.

HKLII.title: HKLII
HKLII.description: Search Hong Kong IP case law including trade mark infringement, passing off, copyright, and patent decisions.

Hong Kong e-Legislation.title: Hong Kong e-Legislation
Hong Kong e-Legislation.description: Official IP ordinances: Trade Marks (Cap 559), Patents (Cap 514), Copyright (Cap 528), Registered Designs (Cap 522).
